DOMTextRun.characters: Welcome to the Voltagen training course.
Here you will learn new fight moves for use in the tournament.
You can run side to side using the LEFT and RIGHT arrow keys.
Dodging can be a valuable skill for getting out of difficult situations.
Press the DOWN arrow key to dodge and you will flip out of the way.
The three normal attacks are Punches, Kicks and Grabs.
These are the buttons A, S and D accordingly.
Try these against a hologram opponent - they can't harm you.
Press SPACEBAR to start the match.
The punches will change if you are surrounded.
The kicks will change if there are people behind you, or if you are running.
The grabs will also change if you are running while executing them.
Some attacks will use up battery points.
You can only use these attacks if you have at least one battery point.
If you run out, don't worry - battery points recharge themselves.
The Q, W and E keys will perform slow motion attacks.
The are punches, kicks and grabs, respectively.
These are far more powerful than normal attacks, but they all use up battery
Try these out and defeat the hologram to continue.
Just like normal attacks, these will also modify.
Slow Motion kicks and Slow Motion grabs will both change when running.
This completes the basic training for the Tournament of Voltagen.
You will soon discover techniques and tactics to aid you in your fights.
